nasb.text: then I shall give you rains in their season, so that the land will yield its produce and the trees of the field will bear their fruit.

esv.text: then I will give you your rains in their season, and the land shall yield its increase, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.

cnv.text: 我就按時給你們降下雨露，使地生出土產，田野的樹木也結果實。

ccb.text: 我就按时降雨给你们，使土地长出庄稼、果树结出果实。
